ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor or user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the actor or user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor or user role */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the user is interacting with */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category the type belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object associated with events */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the event belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "actor" TEXT /* Role of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., ACTION, EYE-TRACKING) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., CLICK, DETECTED_ITEM) */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object associated with the event (e.g., introEvent:btn_start, Cabbage1) */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes related to the event */,
  "app_time" REAL /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_attributes FOREIGN KEY ("attributes") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_actor FOREIGN KEY ("actor") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_object FOREIGN KEY ("object") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_category FOREIGN KEY ("event_category") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the event belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being logged */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was logged */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segmentations" (
  "segmentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segmentation */,
  "segmentation_name" TEXT /* Name of the segmentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segmentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segmentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segmentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segmentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segmentation_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "segmentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segmentation the value belongs to */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* Name of the value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segmentation_values_segmentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("segmentation_id") REFERENCES segmentations ("segmentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segmentations" (
  "user_segmentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user segmentation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being segmented */,
  "segmentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segmentation */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user segmentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user segmentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_segmentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segmentations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segmentations_segmentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("segmentation_id") REFERENCES segmentations ("segmentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segmentations_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES segmentation_values ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crm_data" (
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRM data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the CRM data */,
  "crm_data" TEXT /* CRM data in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CRM data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CRM data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crm_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
